Here's my execution plan for these 7 items, to be done sequentially:

## 1. Mobile menu accordion-

**Approach:** On mobile, the nav-drop items (Products, Resources) should collapse/expand their sub-items on tap instead of showing everything flat. I'll update `header.js` to toggle a class on tap (mobile only) and CSS to hide/show nested lists with a transition.

## 2. Footer mobile accordion-

**Approach:** The footer link columns (Semrush, More tools, Company, Support/Community) should collapse into tappable accordion headers on mobile. I'll update `footer-links.js` or the footer decorator to add click handlers on the `<strong>` headings, toggling the adjacent `<ul>` visibility.

## 3. Country dropdown in hero search-

**Approach:** Replace the static "us" button with a functional dropdown that shows a list of country codes (us, uk, de, fr, es, etc.). On selection, updates the button text and the country parameter in the redirect URL.

## 4. Import script cleanup-

**Approach:** Update the cleanup transformer to also remove mega-menu dropdown content that leaks into the imported HTML. Add selectors for the nav flyout panels that aren't caught by the current `header` removal.

## 5. Solutions slider multi-card view-

**Approach:** At tablet+ (≥768px), show 2-3 cards visible simultaneously in a horizontal scroll rather than one-at-a-time. Update CSS to set card `min-width` and the container to `overflow-x: auto` with snap points, replacing the current show/hide JS approach at that breakpoint.

## 6. Resources slider hover-to-reveal images-

**Approach:** Hide card images by default with `opacity: 0` or `max-height: 0`, reveal on `:hover` with a transition. The card title and tag remain always visible.

## 7. General cleanup-

**Approach:** Review all block CSS/JS for unused code, inconsistencies, or leftover development artifacts. Verify lint passes. Check that the page renders correctly at all breakpoints. Update PROJECT files with final status.

## Assistant

Now I understand the original mobile menu pattern. It uses a **slide-in sub-page pattern** (not accordion):

- Initial state: shows top-level items (Products >, Pricing, Resources >, Enterprise ↗) with Log In / Sign Up at bottom

- Tapping "Products" slides to a new view showing all sub-sections with a "← Back" button at top

- All column groups (Start Here, Find the Right Tools, Platform, Top Apps) are shown vertically with their links, scrollable

This is actually how our current mobile menu already works — when the hamburger is opened, it shows all items including nested ones in a vertical list. The key difference is:

- **Original**: Shows only top-level items first, then slides to sub-page on tap

- **Ours**: Shows everything at once when expanded

For a pragmatic EDS implementation, I'll implement this as an accordion pattern — top-level items with sub-lists are collapsed by default and expand on tap. This is simpler than a full slide animation but achieves the same UX goal of not overwhelming with all links at once.

Let me implement this:

keyboard_arrow_right🔧 Tool Calls

 {
 "id": "toolu_bdrk_01PcgqxsjuKFpgPpufED8YKr",

 "description": "Implement mobile menu accordion",

On mobile (< 1024px), when the hamburger menu is open, the nav items \"Products\" and \"Resources\" should be collapsed by default — only showing the top-level text. Tapping them expands/collapses their sub-items.\n\n## Current Behavior\n\nWhen the hamburger opens (`nav[aria-expanded='true']`), the `.nav-sections` shows ALL nested list items at once — a very long vertical list.\n\n## Desired Behavior (Mobile only)\n\n1. Top-level nav items (Products, Pricing, Resources, Enterprise) are shown\n2. Items with sub-lists (`.nav-drop`) show a \">\" chevron indicating they're expandable\n3. Tapping a `.nav-drop` item toggles its child `<ul>` visibility (collapsed by default)\n4. Non-drop items (Pricing, Enterprise) remain plain links\n\n## Implementation\n\n### CSS Changes (`blocks/header/header.css`)\n\nAdd these rules (NOT inside a desktop media query — they should apply below 1024px):\n\n```css\n/* Mobile accordion: hide sub-lists by default */\nheader nav[aria-expanded='true'] .nav-sections .nav-drop > ul {\n display: none;\n padding-left: 0;\n}\n\nheader nav[aria-expanded='true'] .nav-sections .nav-drop.nav-mobile-expanded > ul {\n display: block;\n}\n```\n\nAlso add a chevron indicator for mobile nav-drop items:\n\n```css\nheader nav[aria-expanded='true'] .nav-sections .default-content-wrapper > ul > li.nav-drop {\n position: relative;\n}\n\nheader nav[aria-expanded='true'] .nav-sections .default-content-wrapper > ul > li.nav-drop::after {\n content: '';\n position: absolute;\n right: 0;\n top: 50%;\n transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(45deg);\n width: 8px;\n height: 8px;\n border: 2px solid currentcolor;\n border-width: 2px 2px 0 0;\n transition: transform var(--transition-fast);\n}\n\nheader nav[aria-expanded='true'] .nav-sections .default-content-wrapper > ul > li.nav-drop.nav-mobile-expanded::after {\n transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(135deg);\n}\n```\n\nThese mobile-specific rules need to be scoped to NOT apply on desktop. Wrap them in `@media (width < 1024px) { }`.\n\n### JS Changes (`blocks/header/header.js`)\n\nIn the existing click handler for navSection items (around line 146), add mobile accordion toggle logic. Currently it has:\n\n```javascript\nnavSection.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n if (isDesktop.matches) {\n if (navSection.classList.contains('nav-drop')) e.preventDefault();\n const expanded = navSection.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true';\n toggleAllNavSections(navSections);\n navSection.setAttribute('aria-expanded', expanded ? 'false' : 'true');\n }\n});\n```\n\nChange it to also handle mobile:\n\n```javascript\nnavSection.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n if (isDesktop.matches) {\n if (navSection.classList.contains('nav-drop')) e.preventDefault();\n const expanded = navSection.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true';\n toggleAllNavSections(navSections);\n navSection.setAttribute('aria-expanded', expanded ? 'false' : 'true');\n } else if (navSection.classList.contains('nav-drop')) {\n e.preventDefault();\n navSection.classList.toggle('nav-mobile-expanded');\n }\n});\n```\n\n### Important\n\n- Do NOT break the desktop mega-menu behavior\n- Do NOT change the hamburger open/close logic\n- Only add the accordion collapse for mobile when `nav[aria-expanded='true']`\n- The desktop media query `@media (width >= 1024px)` rules should remain unchanged\n- Run `npm run lint` after changes\n"
 }
 }

## Assistant

Both changes are in place and lint passes. Here is a summary of what was done:

**Changes made:**

**`/workspace/blocks/header/header.js`** (line 152-154) — Added an `else if` branch to the existing nav section click handler. On mobile (when `isDesktop.matches` is false), if the clicked item has the `nav-drop` class, `e.preventDefault()` stops the link navigation and `navSection.classList.toggle('nav-mobile-expanded')` toggles the accordion open/closed.

**`/workspace/blocks/header/header.css`** (lines 339-370) — Added a `@media (width < 1024px)` block with three rule groups:

- **Sub-list hiding**: `.nav-drop > ul` is `display: none` by default when the mobile menu is open; `.nav-drop.nav-mobile-expanded > ul` is `display: block`.

- **Chevron indicator**: A `::after` pseudo-element on `.nav-drop` items draws a right-pointing chevron arrow using CSS borders.

- **Expanded chevron rotation**: When `.nav-mobile-expanded` is present, the chevron rotates to point downward (135deg).

All rules are scoped under `header nav[aria-expanded='true']` and the `< 1024px` media query, so the desktop mega-menu behavior is completely unaffected. The hamburger open/close logic was not touched. Linting passes cleanly.

 "prompt": "I need you to implement a mobile accordion for the footer link columns in `/workspace/blocks/footer-links/`. On mobile (< 768px), the footer link columns (headed by bold text like \"Semrush\", \"More tools\", \"Company\", \"Support\", \"Community\") should collapse into tappable headings that expand/collapse their link lists on tap.\n\n## Current State\n\nThe footer content structure has sections like:\n```html\n<div>\n <p><strong>Semrush</strong></p>\n <ul>...</ul>\n</div>\n```\n\nThese are all expanded by default at all breakpoints.\n\n## Desired Behavior (Mobile < 768px)\n\n1. A chevron indicator shows the expand/collapse state\n4. On desktop (≥ 768px), everything remains expanded as-is (no accordion behavior)\n\n## Implementation\n\n### Update `/workspace/blocks/footer-links/footer-links.js`\n\nRead the current file first. It's likely an empty decorate function. Add accordion logic:\n\n```javascript\nexport default async function decorate(block) {\n const sections = block.querySelectorAll(':scope > div > div');\n \n sections.forEach((section) => {\n const heading = section.querySelector('p:has(strong)');\n const list = section.querySelector('ul');\n if (!heading || !list) return;\n\n heading.classList.add('footer-links-heading');\n heading.addEventListener('click', () => {\n heading.classList.toggle('footer-links-expanded');\n list.classList.toggle('footer-links-visible');\n });\n });\n}\n```\n\n### Update `/workspace/blocks/footer-links/footer-links.css`\n\nRead the current file first, then add these mobile accordion rules:\n\n```css\n@media (width < 768px) {\n .footer-links .footer-links-heading {\n cursor: pointer;\n position: relative;\n padding-right: 24px;\n }\n\n .footer-links .footer-links-heading::after {\n content: '';\n position: absolute;\n right: 0;\n top: 50%;\n transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(45deg);\n width: 6px;\n height: 6px;\n border: 2px solid currentcolor;\n border-width: 2px 2px 0 0;\n transition: transform var(--transition-fast);\n }\n\n .footer-links .footer-links-heading.footer-links-expanded::after {\n transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(135deg);\n }\n\n .footer-links ul {\n display: none;\n }\n\n .footer-links ul.footer-links-visible {\n display: block;\n }\n}\n```\n\n### Important\n\n- Do NOT affect the desktop (≥ 768px) layout — columns should remain fully expanded there\n- The accordion should only apply on mobile (< 768px)\n- Keep existing footer-links CSS intact (just add the new rules)\n- Run `npm run lint` after changes\n"
 }
 }
]`

 "old_string": "export default async function decorate() {\n // Link columns — no additional DOM restructuring needed\n}",
 "new_string": "export default async function decorate(block) {\n const sections = block.querySelectorAll(':scope > div > div');\n\n sections.forEach((section) => {\n const heading = section.querySelector('p:has(strong)');\n const list = section.querySelector('ul');\n if (!heading || !list) return;\n\n heading.classList.add('footer-links-heading');\n heading.addEventListener('click', () => {\n heading.classList.toggle('footer-links-expanded');\n list.classList.toggle('footer-links-visible');\n });\n });\n}"
 }
 },
 {
 "id": "toolu_bdrk_01AVLdyMcXgiU3H5PZ6e9U5q",
 "name": "Edit",
 "input": {
 "file_path": "/workspace/blocks/footer-links/footer-links.css",
 "old_string": "@media (width >= 1024px) {\n .footer-links > div {\n grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);\n gap: var(--space-l);\n }\n}",
 "new_string": "@media (width < 768px) {\n .footer-links .footer-links-heading {\n cursor: pointer;\n position: relative;\n padding-right: 24px;\n }\n\n .footer-links .footer-links-heading::after {\n content: '';\n position: absolute;\n right: 0;\n top: 50%;\n transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(45deg);\n width: 6px;\n height: 6px;\n border: 2px solid currentcolor;\n border-width: 2px 2px 0 0;\n transition: transform var(--transition-fast);\n }\n\n .footer-links .footer-links-heading.footer-links-expanded::after {\n transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(135deg);\n }\n\n .footer-links ul {\n display: none;\n }\n\n .footer-links ul.footer-links-visible {\n display: block;\n }\n}\n\n@media (width >= 1024px) {\n .footer-links > div {\n grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);\n gap: var(--space-l);\n }\n}"
 }
 }
]`

## Assistant

Both files are in good shape and lint passes. Here is a summary of what was done:

**`/workspace/blocks/footer-links/footer-links.js`** — Added accordion logic to the `decorate` function. It finds each column section (`:scope > div > div`), locates the `p:has(strong)` heading and adjacent `ul`, adds a `footer-links-heading` class to the heading, and attaches a click listener that toggles `footer-links-expanded` on the heading and `footer-links-visible` on the list.

**`/workspace/blocks/footer-links/footer-links.css`** — Added a `@media (width < 768px)` block before the existing desktop media query with the following rules:

- Headings get `cursor: pointer` and right padding for the chevron

- A `::after` pseudo-element renders a CSS chevron (rotated border trick) that rotates from pointing right (collapsed) to pointing down (expanded)

- `ul` elements are hidden by default (`display: none`) and shown when they have the `footer-links-visible` class

- The chevron transition uses the existing `--transition-fast` token (0.2s)

Desktop layout (>= 768px) is completely unaffected — the accordion styles are scoped entirely within the mobile media query, and the JS only adds classes (no `display` manipulation in JS), so desktop `ul` elements remain visible via their default styles.

- The selected country is used in the redirect URL when submitting

- Clicking outside the dropdown closes it

Read the file first, then replace the `<div class=\"hero\">` section and `<div class=\"hero-video\">` section.\n\nThe new structure should be:\n\n```html\n<div>\n <div class=\"announcement-bar\">\n <div>\n <div><p><a href=\"https://www.semrush.com/news/455953-adobe-completes-semrush-acquisition-strengthening-cx-enterprise-with-enhanced-brand-visibility-capabilities/\">Semrush is now an Adobe company. Read the announcement ></a></p></div>\n </div>\n </div>\n</div>\n\n<div>\n <h1>Be found everywhere search happens</h1>\n <p>The leading platform to grow and measure brand visibility across virtually every digital channel.</p>\n <div class=\"get-insights\">\n <div><div></div></div>\n </div>\n <div class=\"section-metadata\">\n <div><div>style</div><div>centered</div></div>\n </div>\n</div>\n\n<div>\n <div class=\"hero-video\">\n <div>\n <div><video src=\"https://www.semrush.com/static/index/videos/plg_toolkits_with_pr.mp4\" autoplay muted loop playsinline></video></div>\n </div>\n </div>\n</div>\n```\n\nNote: The `<div class=\"section-metadata\">` tells EDS to apply the \"centered\" section style. The `get-insights` block is an empty placeholder that JS will fill with the form.\n\n### Create `/workspace/blocks/get-insights/get-insights.js`\n\nMove the form creation logic from `hero.js` into this new block:\n\n```javascript\nexport default async function decorate(block) {\n block.textContent = '';\n block.classList.add('glass-panel');\n\n const countries = ['us', 'uk', 'de', 'fr', 'es', 'it', 'br', 'au', 'ca', 'in', 'jp'];\n\n const inputWrapper = document.createElement('div');\n inputWrapper.className = 'get-insights-input';\n\n const input = document.createElement('input');\n input.type = 'text';\n input.placeholder = 'Enter your website';\n input.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Enter your website');\n inputWrapper.appendChild(input);\n\n const countryBtn = document.createElement('button');\n countryBtn.type = 'button';\n countryBtn.className = 'get-insights-country';\n countryBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Filter by country');\n countryBtn.innerHTML = '<span>us</span>';\n inputWrapper.appendChild(countryBtn);\n\n const dropdown = document.createElement('div');\n dropdown.className = 'get-insights-dropdown';\n dropdown.style.display = 'none';\n countries.forEach((code) => {\n const option = document.createElement('button');\n option.type = 'button';\n option.textContent = code;\n option.addEventListener('click', (ev) => {\n ev.stopPropagation();\n countryBtn.querySelector('span').textContent = code;\n dropdown.style.display = 'none';\n });\n dropdown.appendChild(option);\n });\n countryBtn.addEventListener('click', (ev) => {\n ev.stopPropagation();\n const isHidden = dropdown.style.display === 'none';\n dropdown.style.display = isHidden ? 'flex' : 'none';\n });\n document.addEventListener('click', () => { dropdown.style.display = 'none'; });\n inputWrapper.appendChild(dropdown);\n\n block.appendChild(inputWrapper);\n\n const submitBtn = document.createElement('button');\n submitBtn.type = 'button';\n submitBtn.className = 'get-insights-submit';\n submitBtn.textContent = 'Get insights';\n block.appendChild(submitBtn);\n\n submitBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n const domain = input.value.trim();\n const country = countryBtn.querySelector('span').textContent.trim();\n const redirectTo = domain\n ? encodeURIComponent(`/seo/?domain=${domain}&db=${country}`)\n : '';\n const url = redirectTo\n ? `https://www.semrush.com/signup/?src=main_cta&tk=seo&redirect_to=${redirectTo}`\n : 'https://www.semrush.com/signup/?src=main_cta&tk=seo';\n window.location.href = url;\n });\n\n input.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {\n if (e.key === 'Enter') submitBtn.click();\n });\n}\n```\n\n### Create `/workspace/blocks/get-insights/get-insights.css`\n\n```css\n.get-insights {\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n justify-content: center;\n gap: 0;\n max-width: 560px;\n margin: 0 auto;\n border-radius: var(--radius-pill);\n padding: 6px;\n}\n\n.get-insights-input {\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n flex: 1;\n background: rgb(255 255 255 / 80%);\n border-radius: var(--radius-pill);\n padding: 0 var(--space-s);\n height: 56px;\n position: relative;\n}\n\n.get-insights-input input {\n flex: 1;\n border: none;\n outline: none;\n font-size: var(--font-size-body-m);\n font-family: var(--body-font-family);\n background: transparent;\n padding: 0 var(--space-xs);\n height: 100%;\n min-width: 0;\n}\n\n.get-insights-input input::placeholder {\n color: rgb(108 110 121);\n}\n\n.get-insights-country {\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n gap: 4px;\n border: none;\n background: transparent;\n cursor: pointer;\n font-size: var(--font-size-body-m);\n font-weight: 500;\n color: var(--dark-color);\n padding: 0 var(--space-xs);\n white-space: nowrap;\n}\n\n.get-insights-submit {\n background: var(--accent-color);\n color: var(--dark-color);\n border: none;\n border-radius: var(--radius-pill);\n padding: 0 var(--space-l);\n height: 56px;\n font-size: var(--font-size-body-m);\n font-weight: 600;\n cursor: pointer;\n white-space: nowrap;\n margin-left: var(--space-xs);\n}\n\n.get-insights-submit:hover {\n background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-color) 85%, black);\n}\n\n.get-insights-dropdown {\n position: absolute;\n top: 100%;\n right: 0;\n margin-top: 4px;\n background: #fff;\n border-radius: var(--radius-m);\n box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgb(0 0 0 / 10%);\n padding: var(--space-xs);\n display: flex;\n flex-wrap: wrap;\n gap: 4px;\n z-index: 10;\n max-width: 200px;\n}\n\n.get-insights-dropdown button {\n border: none;\n background: transparent;\n padding: 6px 12px;\n font-size: var(--font-size-body-s);\n cursor: pointer;\n border-radius: 4px;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n font-weight: 500;\n}\n\n.get-insights-dropdown button:hover {\n background: var(--light-color);\n}\n\n@media (width < 768px) {\n .get-insights {\n flex-direction: column;\n gap: var(--space-xs);\n }\n\n .get-insights-input {\n width: 100%;\n }\n\n .get-insights-submit {\n width: 100%;\n margin-left: 0;\n }\n}\n```\n\n## 2. Glass Effect as Reusable Class\n\n### Add to `/workspace/styles/styles.css` (before the section rules at the end)\n\nAdd this global utility class:\n\n```css\n/* Glass panel effect */\n.glass-panel {\n position: relative;\n background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(5 5 5 / 4%) 11%, rgb(255 255 255 / 4%) 89%);\n backdrop-filter: blur(12px);\n -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);\n border: 1px solid rgb(255 255 255 / 20%);\n border-radius: 16px;\n box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgb(0 0 0 / 6%);\n}\n```\n\n## 3. Update Hero Video Block\n\n### Simplify `/workspace/blocks/hero-video/hero-video.js`\n\n```javascript\nexport default async function decorate(block) {\n const video = block.querySelector('video');\n if (video) {\n const wrapper = video.closest('div > div') || video.parentElement;\n if (wrapper) wrapper.classList.add('glass-panel');\n }\n}\n```\n\n### Simplify `/workspace/blocks/hero-video/hero-video.css`\n\nReplace the entire file with:\n\n```css\n.hero-video-wrapper {\n max-width: 100% !important;\n padding: 0 !important;\n}\n\n.hero-video {\n padding: 0 var(--container-padding) 48px;\n text-align: center;\n}\n\n.hero-video > div {\n max-width: 950px;\n margin: 0 auto;\n}\n\n.hero-video > div > div {\n padding: var(--space-xs);\n border-radius: 16px;\n}\n\n.hero-video video {\n width: 100%;\n height: auto;\n border-radius: 12px;\n display: block;\n}\n```\n\n## 4. Simplify Hero Block\n\n### Replace `/workspace/blocks/hero/hero.js` with empty:\n\n```javascript\nexport default async function decorate() {\n // Hero is now default content in a centered section — no JS needed\n}\n```\n\n### Replace `/workspace/blocks/hero/hero.css` with empty:\n\nActually, remove the hero CSS entirely since the hero is now default content. But we still need the gradient background on the centered section. Leave it as a minimal file:\n\n```css\n/* Hero styles are now handled by the .section.centered style in styles.css */\n```\n\nWait — actually the gradient background needs to apply to the section that contains the hero content. Let me add a \"centered\" section style instead.\n\n## 5. Add Centered Section Style\n\n### Add to `/workspace/styles/styles.css` (in the section metadata area at the bottom):\n\n```css\nmain .section.centered {\n text-align: center;\n background:\n url('/content/images/pattern-hero.svg') repeat-x 2px calc(50% - 20px),\n linear-gradient(to bottom, rgb(220 238 235) 0%, rgb(232 225 255) 75%, rgb(255 255 255) 100%);\n padding: 80px var(--container-padding);\n}\n\nmain .section.centered > div {\n max-width: 700px;\n margin: 0 auto;\n}\n\nmain .section.centered h1 {\n font-size: var(--font-size-display);\n font-weight: 600;\n line-height: var(--line-height-snug);\n margin: 0 0 var(--space-m);\n letter-spacing: var(--tracking-tight);\n}\n\nmain .section.centered > div > p {\n font-size: var(--font-size-body-l);\n line-height: var(--line-height-relaxed);\n margin: 0 auto var(--space-m);\n max-width: 540px;\n}\n\n@media (width < 768px) {\n main .section.centered h1 {\n font-size: var(--font-size-heading-xl);\n }\n}\n```\n\n## 6. Improve Logo Marquee\n\n### Update `/workspace/blocks/logo-marquee/logo-marquee.css`\n\nChange these values:\n- Logo opacity: `0.3` → `1` (black, not grey)\n- Animation duration: `25s` → `40s` (slower)\n- Add fade edges using a mask-image gradient\n\nFind and replace:\n- `opacity: 0.3` → `opacity: 1` \n- `animation: marquee 25s` → `animation: marquee 40s`\n\nAdd to `.logo-marquee`:\n```css\nmask-image: linear-gradient(to right, transparent 0%, black 10%, black 90%, transparent 100%);\n-webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to right, transparent 0%, black 10%, black 90%, transparent 100%);\n```\n\n## 7. Remove Old Hero CSS/JS\n\nSince the hero block won't exist in the content anymore (it's now default content), remove the hero-specific gradient/padding from `hero.css`. The `hero.js` should be an empty decorate function.\n\n## 8. Container Max-Width\n\nThe `main > .section > div` already has `max-width: var(--content-max-width)` (1200px). The original site uses 1440px as the outer container. Our sections already respect this via `--container-max-width: 1440px`. The centered section override above uses `max-width: 700px` for text content within (matching how the original constrains the h1/subtitle), but the section itself is full-width.\n\n## Execution Order\n\n1. Create `blocks/get-insights/` with JS + CSS\n2. Update `content/index.plain.html` \n3. Add `.glass-panel` class to `styles.css`\n4. Add `.section.centered` style to `styles.css`\n5. Update `hero-video` block (JS adds glass-panel, CSS simplified, video element)\n6. Update `hero` block (empty JS, minimal CSS)\n7. Update `logo-marquee` CSS\n8. Run `npm run lint`\n\n## IMPORTANT RULES\n- Do NOT break other blocks\n- Do NOT change `scripts.js` or `aem.js`\n- The get-insights block must work as an empty placeholder (no authored content needed)\n- The `.glass-panel` class is added by JS at runtime, not in content\n- Run lint at the end and fix all errors\n"
 }
 }

 "file_path": "/workspace/blocks/get-insights/get-insights.js",
 "content": "export default async function decorate(block) {\n block.textContent = '';\n block.classList.add('glass-panel');\n\n const countries = ['us', 'uk', 'de', 'fr', 'es', 'it', 'br', 'au', 'ca', 'in', 'jp'];\n\n const inputWrapper = document.createElement('div');\n inputWrapper.className = 'get-insights-input';\n\n const input = document.createElement('input');\n input.type = 'text';\n input.placeholder = 'Enter your website';\n input.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Enter your website');\n inputWrapper.appendChild(input);\n\n const countryBtn = document.createElement('button');\n countryBtn.type = 'button';\n countryBtn.className = 'get-insights-country';\n countryBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Filter by country');\n countryBtn.innerHTML = '<span>us</span>';\n inputWrapper.appendChild(countryBtn);\n\n const dropdown = document.createElement('div');\n dropdown.className = 'get-insights-dropdown';\n dropdown.style.display = 'none';\n countries.forEach((code) => {\n const option = document.createElement('button');\n option.type = 'button';\n option.textContent = code;\n option.addEventListener('click', (ev) => {\n ev.stopPropagation();\n countryBtn.querySelector('span').textContent = code;\n dropdown.style.display = 'none';\n });\n dropdown.appendChild(option);\n });\n countryBtn.addEventListener('click', (ev) => {\n ev.stopPropagation();\n const isHidden = dropdown.style.display === 'none';\n dropdown.style.display = isHidden ? 'flex' : 'none';\n });\n document.addEventListener('click', () => { dropdown.style.display = 'none'; });\n inputWrapper.appendChild(dropdown);\n\n block.appendChild(inputWrapper);\n\n const submitBtn = document.createElement('button');\n submitBtn.type = 'button';\n submitBtn.className = 'get-insights-submit';\n submitBtn.textContent = 'Get insights';\n block.appendChild(submitBtn);\n\n submitBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n const domain = input.value.trim();\n const country = countryBtn.querySelector('span').textContent.trim();\n const redirectTo = domain\n ? encodeURIComponent(`/seo/?domain=${domain}&db=${country}`)\n : '';\n const url = redirectTo\n ? `https://www.semrush.com/signup/?src=main_cta&tk=seo&redirect_to=${redirectTo}`\n : 'https://www.semrush.com/signup/?src=main_cta&tk=seo';\n window.location.href = url;\n });\n\n input.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {\n if (e.key === 'Enter') submitBtn.click();\n });\n}\n"
 }
 }
]`

 "content": "export default async function decorate(block) {\n block.textContent = '';\n block.classList.add('glass-panel');\n\n const countries = ['us', 'uk', 'de', 'fr', 'es', 'it', 'br', 'au', 'ca', 'in', 'jp'];\n\n const inputWrapper = document.createElement('div');\n inputWrapper.className = 'get-insights-input';\n\n const input = document.createElement('input');\n input.type = 'text';\n input.placeholder = 'Enter your website';\n input.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Enter your website');\n inputWrapper.appendChild(input);\n\n const countryBtn = document.createElement('button');\n countryBtn.type = 'button';\n countryBtn.className = 'get-insights-country';\n countryBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Filter by country');\n countryBtn.innerHTML = '<span>us</span>';\n inputWrapper.appendChild(countryBtn);\n\n const dropdown = document.createElement('div');\n dropdown.className = 'get-insights-dropdown';\n dropdown.style.display = 'none';\n countries.forEach((code) => {\n const option = document.createElement('button');\n option.type = 'button';\n option.textContent = code;\n option.addEventListener('click', (ev) => {\n ev.stopPropagation();\n countryBtn.querySelector('span').textContent = code;\n dropdown.style.display = 'none';\n });\n dropdown.appendChild(option);\n });\n countryBtn.addEventListener('click', (ev) => {\n ev.stopPropagation();\n const isHidden = dropdown.style.display === 'none';\n dropdown.style.display = isHidden ? 'flex' : 'none';\n });\n document.addEventListener('click', () => { dropdown.style.display = 'none'; });\n inputWrapper.appendChild(dropdown);\n\n block.appendChild(inputWrapper);\n\n const submitBtn = document.createElement('button');\n submitBtn.type = 'button';\n submitBtn.className = 'get-insights-submit';\n submitBtn.textContent = 'Get insights';\n block.appendChild(submitBtn);\n\n submitBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n const domain = input.value.trim();\n const country = countryBtn.querySelector('span').textContent.trim();\n const redirectTo = domain\n ? encodeURIComponent(`/seo/?domain=${domain}&db=${country}`)\n : '';\n const url = redirectTo\n ? `https://www.semrush.com/signup/?src=main_cta&tk=seo&redirect_to=${redirectTo}`\n : 'https://www.semrush.com/signup/?src=main_cta&tk=seo';\n window.location.href = url;\n });\n\n input.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {\n if (e.key === 'Enter') submitBtn.click();\n });\n}\n"
 }
 }
]`

 "file_path": "/workspace/blocks/get-insights/get-insights.js",
 "content": "export default async function decorate(block) {\n block.textContent = '';\n block.classList.add('glass-panel');\n\n const countries = ['us', 'uk', 'de', 'fr', 'es', 'it', 'br', 'au', 'ca', 'in', 'jp'];\n\n const inputWrapper = document.createElement('div');\n inputWrapper.className = 'get-insights-input';\n\n const input = document.createElement('input');\n input.type = 'text';\n input.placeholder = 'Enter your website';\n input.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Enter your website');\n inputWrapper.appendChild(input);\n\n const countryBtn = document.createElement('button');\n countryBtn.type = 'button';\n countryBtn.className = 'get-insights-country';\n countryBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Filter by country');\n countryBtn.innerHTML = '<span>us</span>';\n inputWrapper.appendChild(countryBtn);\n\n const dropdown = document.createElement('div');\n dropdown.className = 'get-insights-dropdown';\n dropdown.style.display = 'none';\n countries.forEach((code) => {\n const option = document.createElement('button');\n option.type = 'button';\n option.textContent = code;\n option.addEventListener('click', (ev) => {\n ev.stopPropagation();\n countryBtn.querySelector('span').textContent = code;\n dropdown.style.display = 'none';\n });\n dropdown.appendChild(option);\n });\n countryBtn.addEventListener('click', (ev) => {\n ev.stopPropagation();\n const isHidden = dropdown.style.display === 'none';\n dropdown.style.display = isHidden ? 'flex' : 'none';\n });\n document.addEventListener('click', () => { dropdown.style.display = 'none'; });\n inputWrapper.appendChild(dropdown);\n\n block.appendChild(inputWrapper);\n\n const submitBtn = document.createElement('button');\n submitBtn.type = 'button';\n submitBtn.className = 'get-insights-submit';\n submitBtn.textContent = 'Get insights';\n block.appendChild(submitBtn);\n\n submitBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n const domain = input.value.trim();\n const country = countryBtn.querySelector('span').textContent.trim();\n const redirectTo = domain\n ? encodeURIComponent(`/seo/?domain=${domain}&db=${country}`)\n : '';\n const url = redirectTo\n ? `https://www.semrush.com/signup/?src=main_cta&tk=seo&redirect_to=${redirectTo}`\n : 'https://www.semrush.com/signup/?src=main_cta&tk=seo';\n window.location.href = url;\n });\n\n input.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {\n if (e.key === 'Enter') submitBtn.click();\n });\n}\n"
 }
 }

 "old_string": "export default async function decorate(block) {\n const ctaLink = block.querySelector('a[href*=\"/signup/\"]');\n if (!ctaLink) return;\n\n const ctaWrapper = ctaLink.closest('p');\n if (!ctaWrapper) return;\n\n const form = document.createElement('div');\n form.className = 'hero-search';\n\n const inputWrapper = document.createElement('div');\n inputWrapper.className = 'hero-search-input';\n\n const input = document.createElement('input');\n input.type = 'text';\n input.placeholder = 'Enter your website';\n input.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Enter your website');\n inputWrapper.appendChild(input);\n\n const countryBtn = document.createElement('button');\n countryBtn.type = 'button';\n countryBtn.className = 'hero-search-country';\n countryBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Filter by country');\n countryBtn.innerHTML = '<span>us</span>';\n inputWrapper.appendChild(countryBtn);\n\n const countries = ['us', 'uk', 'de', 'fr', 'es', 'it', 'br', 'au', 'ca', 'in', 'jp'];\n const dropdown = document.createElement('div');\n dropdown.className = 'hero-search-dropdown';\n dropdown.style.display = 'none';\n\n countries.forEach((code) => {\n const option = document.createElement('button');\n option.type = 'button';\n option.textContent = code;\n option.addEventListener('click', (ev) => {\n ev.stopPropagation();\n countryBtn.querySelector('span').textContent = code;\n dropdown.style.display = 'none';\n });\n dropdown.appendChild(option);\n });\n\n countryBtn.addEventListener('click', (ev) => {\n ev.stopPropagation();\n dropdown.style.display = dropdown.style.display === 'none' ? 'flex' : 'none';\n });\n\n document.addEventListener('click', () => {\n dropdown.style.display = 'none';\n });\n\n inputWrapper.appendChild(dropdown);\n\n form.appendChild(inputWrapper);\n\n const submitBtn = document.createElement('button');\n submitBtn.type = 'button';\n submitBtn.className = 'hero-search-submit';\n submitBtn.textContent = 'Get insights';\n form.appendChild(submitBtn);\n\n submitBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n const domain = input.value.trim();\n const country = countryBtn.querySelector('span').textContent.trim();\n const redirectTo = domain\n ? encodeURIComponent(`/seo/?domain=${domain}&db=${country}`)\n : '';\n const url = redirectTo\n ? `https://www.semrush.com/signup/?src=main_cta&tk=seo&redirect_to=${redirectTo}`\n : 'https://www.semrush.com/signup/?src=main_cta&tk=seo';\n window.location.href = url;\n });\n\n input.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {\n if (e.key === 'Enter') submitBtn.click();\n });\n\n ctaWrapper.replaceWith(form);\n}",

 }

 :host {
 all: initial;
 }

 .gf-scroll-remove::-webkit-scrollbar {
 border-radius-bottom-right: 15px;
 }

 button {
 cursor: pointer;
 transition: transform 0.1s ease;
 }

 button:active {
 transform: scale(0.98);
 }

 .give-freely-close-button:hover {
 opacity: 0.7;
 }

 input[type="radio"] {
 margin-right: 8px;
 }

 hr {
 border: none;
 border-top: 1px solid #e5e5e5;
 margin: 1em 0;
 }

 dialog::backdrop {
 background-color: revert;
 }

 dialog.backdrop-hidden::backdrop {
 background-color: transparent;
 }
